fixes: Removed list/unit/part/type chips from the study card.
Removed the extra flip-answer header so only learning content remains in the flip card.
Dari speech now tries fa-AF, fa-IR, fa, Persian/Farsi/Dari voice-name matches, then Arabic fallback if no Persian voice exists.
If mobile provides no compatible voice, the app shows a clear warning instead of failing silently.
known_limit: A static GitHub Pages app cannot force a Dari voice if the phone/browser does not expose any Dari/Persian/Farsi voice. Guaranteed mobile Dari audio would require pre-generated audio files or a cloud text-to-speech service.
